field.label: DNS Tunneling Detection
field.help: Detect DNS tunneling attempts used to bypass firewalls and exfiltrate data

field.label: HTTP Steganography Detection
field.help: Detect hidden data embedded in HTTP headers, cookies, and legitimate-looking traffic

field.label: ICMP Tunneling Detection
field.help: Detect ICMP tunneling used to establish covert communication channels

field.label: Protocol Anomaly Detection
field.help: Detect protocol anomalies that may indicate covert channel usage or protocol abuse

field.label: Payload Entropy Analysis
field.help: Analyze payload entropy to detect encrypted or compressed data hiding in plain protocols

field.label: Timing Channel Detection
field.help: Detect timing-based covert channels that use delays and intervals to transmit information

field.label: Size Pattern Analysis
field.help: Analyze packet size patterns to detect covert channels using size modulation techniques
